source:
#### The purpose of this pyspark notebook is to read Delta tables from owb_standarsied_db to owb_harmonisied_db and load all records as Delta tables along with metadata columns.

**Author**               **Created Date**              **Description**  
Rohit Shukla         04-Mar-2025             The functionality of this notebook is to Delta Table dim_inspector_address into owb-harmonisied_db layer.

#import all libraries and initialise Spark Session
import calendar
from datetime import datetime, timedelta, date
import requests
import pyspark.sql.functions as F 
import re
from notebookutils import mssparkutils
from pyspark.sql.functions import lit, current_timestamp, to_date ,expr, md5, col, date_format,when, to_date,current_date,concat,cast,regexp_replace,coalesce,concat_ws,row_number, to_timestamp
from pprint import pprint as pp
from pyspark.sql.types import *
from pyspark.sql.window import Window
from pyspark.sql import SparkSession
spark = SparkSession.builder.getOrCreate()
from delta.tables import DeltaTable
#ignore FutureWarning messages 
import warnings
warnings.filterwarnings("ignore", message="iteritems is deprecated")

# Define delta table names, database name and table paths
source_database_name = "odw_standardised_db"
target_database_name = "odw_harmonised_db"
source_delta_table = f"{source_database_name}.inspector_addresses_weekly"
target_delta_table = f"{target_database_name}.live_dim_inspector_address"
delta_table_path = f"abfss://odw-harmonised@{storage_account}saphr/live_dim_inspector_address"

print(source_delta_table)
print(target_delta_table)
print(delta_table_path)

# Read source data from Delta Tables
#df_source_inspector_address = spark.read.format("delta").option("inferSchema", "false").table(source_delta_table)

src_spark_inspector_active_sql = f"""
                SELECT DISTINCT
                    COALESCE(inspector_raw.id, r2.id, inspector_raw.PINSStaffNumber, -1) AS source_id,
                    sap_hr.PersNo AS pins_staff_number,
                    COALESCE(SAPPreferredName.PreferredFirstName, sap_hr.FirstName) AS given_names,
                    COALESCE(SAPPreferredName.PreferredFamilyName, sap_hr.Lastname) AS family_name,
                    COALESCE(
                        CONCAT(SAPPreferredName.PreferredFirstName, ' ', SAPPreferredName.PreferredFamilyName),
                        CONCAT(sap_hr.FirstName, ' ', sap_hr.LastName)
                    ) AS inspector_name,
                    inspector_address.PostalCode AS inspector_postcode,
                    UPPER(sap_hr.EmploymentStatus) AS active_status,
                    NULL AS branch,
                    sap_hr.OrgStartDate AS date_in,
                    NULL AS date_out,
                    inspector_address.ChartingOfficerforInspector AS eo_responsible,
                    CASE 
                        WHEN sap_hr.WorkContract = 'Non-Salaried Inspector' THEN 'NSI'
                        WHEN sap_hr.PSgroup = 'BAND 1' AND sap_hr.WorkC = 'FT' THEN 'FTC-B1'
                        WHEN sap_hr.PSgroup = 'BAND 2' AND sap_hr.WorkC = 'FT' THEN 'FTC-B2'
                        WHEN sap_hr.PSgroup = 'BAND 3' AND sap_hr.WorkC = 'FT' THEN 'FTC-B3'
                        WHEN sap_hr.PSgroup = 'BAND 1' AND sap_hr.WorkC <> 'FT' THEN 'B1'
                        WHEN sap_hr.PSgroup = 'BAND 2' AND sap_hr.WorkC <> 'FT' THEN 'B2'
                        WHEN sap_hr.PSgroup = 'BAND 3' AND sap_hr.WorkC <> 'FT' THEN 'B3'
                        ELSE sap_hr.PSgroup
                    END AS grade,
                    CASE
                        WHEN sap_hr.WorkContract = 'Non-Salaried Inspector' THEN 'NSI'
                        ELSE inspector_group.resource_group
                    END AS resource_group,
                    NULL AS staff,
                    NULL AS trainee_level,
                    inspector_group.inspector_group,
                    ROUND(sap_hr.FTE, 2) AS FTE,
                    sap_hr.Location AS primary_location,
                    NULL AS primary_FTE,
                    NULL AS secondary_location,
                    NULL AS secondary_FTE,
                    CONCAT_WS(' ',
                        inspector_address.StreetandHouseNumber,
                        inspector_address.2ndAddressLine,
                        inspector_address.City,
                        inspector_address.District,
                        inspector_address.PostalCode,
                        inspector_address.Region
                    ) AS InspectorAddress,
                    inspector_address.Telephoneno,
                    inspector_address.WorkMobile,
                    CASE WHEN sap_hr.Position1 = 'Inspector Manager' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS is_sgl,
                    CASE 
                        WHEN sap_hr.WorkContract = 'Non-Salaried Inspector' AND sap_hr.EmploymentStatus = 'ACTIVE'
                            THEN 'nsi.planning@planninginspectorate.gov.uk'
                        ELSE vw_SAP_HR_email.email_address
                    END AS pins_email_address,
                    CASE 
                        WHEN sap_hr.WorkContract = 'Non-Salaried Inspector' THEN 'Non-Salaried Inspector'
                        ELSE sap_hr.OrganizationalUnit
                    END AS resource_code,
                    CASE 
                        WHEN sap_hr.WorkC = 'FT' THEN 'FTC'
                        WHEN sap_hr.WorkContract = 'Non-Salaried Inspector' THEN 'NSI'
                        ELSE 'Salaried'
                    END AS emp_type,
                    sp_list_inspector_map.HorizonID,
                    'SAP' AS inspectorSource
                FROM odw_harmonised_db.load_sap_hr_monthly sap_hr
                LEFT JOIN odw_standardised_db.load_sp_list_inspector_map sp_list_inspector_map
                    ON sap_hr.PersNo = sp_list_inspector_map.StaffNumber
                LEFT JOIN odw_standardised_db.load_inspector_raw inspector_raw
                    ON CAST(sap_hr.EmployeeNo AS INT) = inspector_raw.PINSStaffNumber AND inspector_raw.ActiveStatus = 'ACTIVE'
                LEFT JOIN odw_standardised_db.load_inspector_raw r2
                    ON CAST(sap_hr.PersNo AS INT) = r2.PINSStaffNumber AND r2.ActiveStatus = 'ACTIVE'
                LEFT JOIN odw_harmonised_db.sap_hr_inspector_address inspector_address
                    ON sap_hr.PersNo = inspector_address.StaffNumber
                    AND inspector_address.IsActive = 'Y'
                LEFT JOIN (
                    SELECT PersNo, MAX(Leaving) AS Leaving
                    FROM odw_harmonised_db.load_sap_hr_leavers
                    GROUP BY PersNo
                ) leavers
                    ON sap_hr.PersNo = leavers.PersNo
                LEFT JOIN odw_standardised_db.bis_inspector_group inspector_group
                    ON sap_hr.OrganizationalUnit = inspector_group.sap_ou
                LEFT JOIN odw_harmonised_db.load_vw_sap_hr_email vw_SAP_HR_email
                    ON sap_hr.PersNo = vw_SAP_HR_email.PersNo
                LEFT JOIN odw_standardised_db.load_sappreferredname SAPPreferredName
                    ON sap_hr.PersNo = SAPPreferredName.PERSNO
                WHERE
                    sap_hr.PSgroup IN ('APO', 'APP HEO', 'BAND 1','BAND 2','BAND 3', 'PL')
                    OR sap_hr.WorkContract = 'Non-Salaried Inspector'
                    OR sap_hr.Position1 IN ('Cost Decision Officer', 'Chief Operating Officer', 'Chief Planning Inspector')"""


df_active_inspector_address = spark.sql(src_spark_inspector_active_sql)

src_spark_inspector_inactive_sql = """WITH sp_list_inspector AS (
                        SELECT 
                            a.StaffNumber,
                            a.Modified,
                            a.HorizonID
                        FROM odw_standardised_db.load_sp_list_inspector_map a
                        INNER JOIN (
                            SELECT StaffNumber, MAX(Modified) AS AsModified
                            FROM odw_standardised_db.load_sp_list_inspector_map
                            GROUP BY StaffNumber
                        ) b
                        ON a.StaffNumber = b.StaffNumber
                        AND a.Modified = b.AsModified
                    ),
                    inspector_raw AS (
                        SELECT *
                        FROM odw_standardised_db.load_inspector_raw
                        WHERE ActiveStatus = 'NON-ACTIVE'
                        AND GivenNames IS NOT NULL
                        AND FamilyName IS NOT NULL
                        AND NAME IS NOT NULL
                    ),
                    r2 AS (
                        SELECT *
                        FROM odw_standardised_db.load_inspector_raw
                        WHERE ActiveStatus = 'NON-ACTIVE'
                        AND GivenNames IS NOT NULL
                        AND FamilyName IS NOT NULL
                        AND NAME IS NOT NULL
                    ),
                    leavers AS (
                        SELECT PersNo, MAX(Leaving) AS Leaving
                        FROM odw_harmonised_db.load_sap_hr_leavers SAP_HR_Leavers
                        GROUP BY PersNo
                    )
                    SELECT  DISTINCT
                            COALESCE(inspector_raw.id, r2.id, CAST(inspector_raw.PINSStaffNumber AS INT), -1) AS source_id,
                            SAP_HR_Leavers.PersNo AS pins_staff_number,
                            SAP_HR_Leavers.FirstName AS given_names,
                            SAP_HR_Leavers.LastName AS family_name,
                            CONCAT(SAP_HR_Leavers.FirstName, ' ', SAP_HR_Leavers.LastName) AS inspector_name,
                            inspector_address.PostalCode AS inspector_postcode,
                            'NON-ACTIVE' AS active_status,
                            NULL AS branch,
                            SAP_HR_Leavers.OrgStartDate AS date_in,
                            SAP_HR_Leavers.Leaving AS date_out,
                            inspector_address.ChartingOfficerforInspector AS eo_responsible,
                            CASE 
                            WHEN SAP_HR_Leavers.WorkC = 'NS' THEN 'NSI'
                            WHEN SAP_HR_Leavers.PSgroup = 'BAND 1' AND SAP_HR_Leavers.WorkC = 'FT' THEN 'FTC-B1'
                            WHEN SAP_HR_Leavers.PSgroup = 'BAND 2' AND SAP_HR_Leavers.WorkC = 'FT' THEN 'FTC-B2'
                            WHEN SAP_HR_Leavers.PSgroup = 'BAND 3' AND SAP_HR_Leavers.WorkC = 'FT' THEN 'FTC-B3'
                            WHEN SAP_HR_Leavers.PSgroup = 'BAND 1' AND SAP_HR_Leavers.WorkC <> 'FT' THEN 'B1'
                            WHEN SAP_HR_Leavers.PSgroup = 'BAND 2' AND SAP_HR_Leavers.WorkC <> 'FT' THEN 'B2'
                            WHEN SAP_HR_Leavers.PSgroup = 'BAND 3' AND SAP_HR_Leavers.WorkC <> 'FT' THEN 'B3'
                            ELSE SAP_HR_Leavers.PSgroup
                            END AS grade,
                            CASE
                            WHEN SAP_HR_Leavers.WorkContract = 'Non-Salaried Inspector' THEN 'NSI'
                            ELSE inspector_group.resource_group
                            END AS resource_group,
                            NULL AS staff,
                            NULL AS trainee_level,
                            inspector_group.inspector_group AS inspector_group,
                            NULL AS FTE,
                            SAP_HR_Leavers.Location AS primary_location,
                            NULL AS primary_FTE,
                            NULL AS secondary_location,
                            NULL AS secondary_FTE,
                            NULL AS InspectorAddress,
                            NULL AS Telephoneno,
                            NULL AS WorkMobile,
                            CASE WHEN SAP_HR_Leavers.Position1 = 'Inspector Manager' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS is_sgl,
                            CASE 
                            WHEN SAP_HR_Leavers.WorkContract = 'Non-Salaried Inspector'
                                AND SAP_HR_Leavers.EmploymentStatus = 'ACTIVE' 
                            THEN 'nsi.planning@planninginspectorate.gov.uk' 
                            ELSE vw_SAP_HR_email.email_address 
                            END AS pins_email_address,
                            CASE 
                            WHEN SAP_HR_Leavers.WorkContract = 'Non-Salaried Inspector' 
                            THEN 'Non-Salaried Inspector' 
                            ELSE SAP_HR_Leavers.OrganizationalUnit
                            END AS resource_code,
                            CASE 
                            WHEN SAP_HR_Leavers.WorkC = 'FT' THEN 'FTC'
                            WHEN SAP_HR_Leavers.WorkContract = 'Non-Salaried Inspector' THEN 'NSI'
                            ELSE 'Salaried'
                            END AS emp_type,
                            sp_list_inspector.HorizonID AS HorizonID,
                            'SAP Leaver' AS inspectorSource
                    FROM odw_harmonised_db.load_sap_hr_leavers SAP_HR_Leavers
                    INNER JOIN leavers
                        ON SAP_HR_Leavers.PersNo = leavers.PersNo
                        AND SAP_HR_Leavers.Leaving = leavers.Leaving
                    LEFT OUTER JOIN sp_list_inspector
                        ON SAP_HR_Leavers.PersNo = sp_list_inspector.StaffNumber
                    LEFT OUTER JOIN inspector_raw
                        ON CAST(SAP_HR_Leavers.EmployeeNo AS INT) = inspector_raw.PINSStaffNumber
                    LEFT OUTER JOIN r2
                        ON CAST(SAP_HR_Leavers.PersNo AS INT) = r2.PINSStaffNumber
                    LEFT OUTER JOIN odw_harmonised_db.sap_hr_inspector_address inspector_address
                        ON SAP_HR_Leavers.PersNo = inspector_address.StaffNumber
                        AND inspector_address.IsActive = 'Y'
                    LEFT OUTER JOIN odw_standardised_db.bis_inspector_group inspector_group
                        ON SAP_HR_Leavers.OrganizationalUnit = inspector_group.sap_ou
                    LEFT OUTER JOIN odw_harmonised_db.load_vw_sap_hr_email vw_SAP_HR_email
                        ON SAP_HR_Leavers.PersNo = vw_SAP_HR_email.PersNo
                    WHERE
                        SAP_HR_Leavers.PSgroup IN ('APO', 'APP HEO', 'BAND 1', 'BAND 2', 'BAND 3', 'PL')
                        OR SAP_HR_Leavers.WorkContract = 'Non-Salaried Inspector'"""




df_inactive_inspector_address = spark.sql(src_spark_inspector_inactive_sql)

df_combined_inspector_address = df_active_inspector_address.unionByName(df_inactive_inspector_address)

df_combined_inspector_address.createOrReplaceTempView("temp_inspector")

src_spark_inspector_unassociated_sql = """SELECT 
                            DISTINCT
                            COALESCE(inspector_raw.id, -1) AS source_id,
                            CASE 
                                WHEN LENGTH(CAST(inspector_raw.PINSStaffNumber AS STRING)) = 6 THEN 
                                CASE SUBSTRING(CAST(inspector_raw.PINSStaffNumber AS STRING), 1, 1)
                                    WHEN '5' THEN CONCAT('00', CAST(inspector_raw.PINSStaffNumber AS STRING))
                                    ELSE CAST(inspector_raw.PINSStaffNumber AS STRING)
                                END
                            ELSE CAST(inspector_raw.PINSStaffNumber AS STRING)
                            END AS pins_staff_number,
                            inspector_raw.GivenNames given_names,
                            inspector_raw.FamilyName family_name,
                            CONCAT(inspector_raw.GivenNames, ' ', inspector_raw.FamilyName) AS inspector_name,
                            inspector_raw.Postcode inspector_postcode,
                            inspector_raw.ActiveStatus active_status,
                            inspector_raw.Branch,
                            inspector_raw.DateIn Date_In,
                            inspector_raw.DateOut Date_Out,
                            inspector_raw.EOResponsible eo_responsible,
                            inspector_raw.Grade,
                            inspector_raw.ResourceGroup Resource_Group,
                            inspector_raw.Staff,
                            inspector_raw.TraineeLevel trainee_level,
                            'No Group Associated' AS inspector_group,
                            NULL AS FTE,
                            NULL AS primary_location,
                            NULL AS primary_FTE,
                            NULL AS secondary_location,
                            NULL AS secondary_FTE,
                            NULL AS InspectorAddress,
                            NULL AS TelephoneNo,
                            NULL AS WorkMobile,
                            NULL AS is_sgl,
                            NULL AS pins_email_address,
                            inspector_raw.ResourceGroup AS resource_code,
                            CASE LEFT(inspector_raw.Grade, 3)
                                WHEN 'FTC' THEN 'FTC'
                                WHEN 'NSI' THEN 'NSI'
                                ELSE 'Salaried'
                            END AS emp_type,
                            NULL AS HorizonID,
                            'RAW' AS inspectorSource
                        FROM odw_standardised_db.load_inspector_raw inspector_raw
                        LEFT JOIN odw_harmonised_db.load_sap_hr_monthly sap_hr
                        ON inspector_raw.PINSStaffNumber = CAST(sap_hr.EmployeeNo AS INT)
                        LEFT JOIN odw_harmonised_db.sap_hr_inspector_address inspector_address
                        ON sap_hr.PersNo = inspector_address.StaffNumber AND inspector_address.IsActive = 'Y'
                        LEFT JOIN odw_harmonised_db.load_vw_sap_hr_email S
                        ON inspector_raw.PINSStaffNumber = CAST(REPLACE(LTRIM(REPLACE(S.EmployeeNo, '0', ' ')), ' ', '0') AS INT)
                        LEFT JOIN odw_harmonised_db.load_sap_pins_email_monthly e2
                        ON CASE LEFT(inspector_raw.PINSStaffNumber, 2)
                            WHEN '50' THEN CASE LENGTH(inspector_raw.PINSStaffNumber)
                            WHEN 6 THEN inspector_raw.PINSStaffNumber
                            ELSE SUBSTRING(CAST(inspector_raw.PINSStaffNumber AS STRING), 3, LENGTH(CAST(inspector_raw.PINSStaffNumber AS STRING)))
                            END
                            ELSE inspector_raw.PINSStaffNumber
                        END = e2.StaffNumber
                        LEFT JOIN (
                        SELECT DISTINCT a.SubGroup, b.name, b.StaffNumber, b.IsSGL, a.most_recent_entry_in_deployment
                        FROM (
                            SELECT SubGroup, MAX(Date) AS most_recent_entry_in_deployment
                            FROM odw_standardised_db.load_iss_deployment
                            WHERE StaffNumber IS NOT NULL AND IsSGL = 1 AND Date <= CURRENT_DATE()
                            GROUP BY SubGroup
                        ) a
                        INNER JOIN odw_standardised_db.load_iss_deployment b
                            ON a.SubGroup = b.SubGroup AND a.most_recent_entry_in_deployment = b.Date
                        WHERE b.IsSGL = 1 AND b.SubGroup NOT IN ('PO1', 'PO2') AND a.most_recent_entry_in_deployment > '2020-06-30'
                        ) ids
                        ON inspector_raw.PINSStaffNumber = ids.StaffNumber
                        LEFT JOIN temp_inspector
                        ON inspector_raw.FamilyName = temp_inspector.family_name
                        AND inspector_raw.GivenNames = temp_inspector.given_names
                        AND inspector_raw.Postcode = temp_inspector.inspector_postcode
                        WHERE sap_hr.PersNo IS NULL
                        AND temp_inspector.source_id IS NULL
                        AND inspector_raw.PINSStaffNumber IS NOT NULL
                        AND inspector_raw.ActiveStatus <> 'ACTIVE'
                        AND inspector_raw.id NOT IN (6,20,27,29,39,87,136,149,205,251,268,348,349,485,552,578,579,655,726,
                            156642,161028,354954,356300,357364,354712,508228,511402,535963,538712,539959
                        )"""

df_inspector_unassociated_group = spark.sql(src_spark_inspector_unassociated_sql)

df_all_inspector_address = df_combined_inspector_address.unionByName(df_inspector_unassociated_group)

df_all_inspector_address.createOrReplaceTempView("all_inspector_address")

print("Before Delete duplicate")
print(df_all_inspector_address.count())

src_dedup_all_inspector_address_sql = """with ddd as
                                    (
                                    select family_name, given_names from all_inspector_address
                                    group by  family_name, given_names 
                                    having COUNT(*) > 1
                                    )
                                    SELECT i.* from all_inspector_address i inner join ddd d on i.family_name = d.family_name and i.given_names = d.given_names 
                                    and i.inspectorSource = 'RAW' """

df_dup_all_inspector_address = spark.sql(src_dedup_all_inspector_address_sql)


# Subtract duplicates from the full set
df_dedup_all_inspector_address = df_all_inspector_address.subtract(df_dup_all_inspector_address)

# Add the RowID column to the DataFrame
rowid_columns = [c for c in df_dedup_all_inspector_address.columns]

# Convert RowID columns to hash values
rowid_expr = md5(concat_ws("|", *[coalesce(col(c).cast("string"), lit("")) for c in rowid_columns]))

# Add the RowID column to the DataFrame
#df_transform_inspector_address = df_transform_inspector_address.withColumn("RowID", rowid_expr)


#Add Audit columns records including ROWID
df_audit_columns_inspector_address = (
    df_dedup_all_inspector_address
    .withColumn("SourceSystemID", lit("SapHr"))
    .withColumn("IngestionDate", current_timestamp())
    .withColumn("ValidFrom", expr("current_timestamp() - INTERVAL 1 DAY"))
    .withColumn("ValidTo", current_timestamp())
    .withColumn("RowID", rowid_expr)  # assuming you defined `rowid_expr` earlier
    .withColumn("IsActive", lit("Y"))
)


#src_dedup_all_inspector_address_sql = """with ddd as
#                                    (
#                                    select UPPER(RTRIM(LTRIM(inspector_name))) inspector_name from all_inspector_address
#                                    group by  UPPER(RTRIM(LTRIM(inspector_name)))
#                                    having COUNT(*) > 1
#                                    )
#                                    SELECT i.* from all_inspector_address i inner join ddd d on UPPER(RTRIM(LTRIM(i.inspector_name))) = UPPER(RTRIM(LTRIM(d.inspector_name))) and i.inspectorSource = 'RAW' """                                    


print("after Delete duplicate")
print(df_dedup_all_inspector_address.count())

#print(df_dedup_all_inspector_address.printSchema())

display(df_audit_columns_inspector_address)

# Write new records to target Delta Table
try:
    # Overwrite the entire delta table with transfored dataframe
    df_audit_columns_inspector_address.write.format("delta").mode("overwrite").save(delta_table_path)


    print(f" Records overwritten successfully to {target_delta_table}")

except Exception as e:
    print(f" Error writing to {target_delta_table}: {str(e)}")
    raise
